visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses and a grey flat cap speaks directly to the camera. He wears a white t-shirt featuring cat graphics and sits in a bright indoor environment, likely a cafe or airport lounge, with blurred figures moving in the background. (2) The screen cuts to news articles on a mobile interface discussing airline power bank regulations, followed by a night aerial shot of a city's glowing lights from a plane window. (3) The man returns, demonstrating a smartphone and toggling the Control Center to show Airplane Mode. Yellow-outlined text appears frequently on the screen. (4) He presents two slim power banks, one blue and one pink, placing them on a table. The camera shows close-ups of the brand logo 'ADAM' and the model 'VIONTA'. (5) Close-up of a hand pressing a button on the pink power bank; a digital numerical display flashes three times, indicating a mode activation. (6) The power bank is shown magnetically attached to the back of an iPhone, with a MagSafe charging animation appearing on the phone's screen. (7) Comparison shots emphasize the slimness of the power bank against an iPhone 16 Pro Max. The man shows a matching grey protective pouch. (8) He continues to talk, holding the phone and power bank combo, gesturing with his hands while sitting at the same table in the brightly lit indoor space.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Subtitle]: 今年全球航空公司. (2) [Variety]: 行動電源的規範. [Slogan]: 越改越嚴格. (3) [Variety]: 這支片必看. [Subtitle]: 大家都知道. (4) [Variety]: 現在行動電源也有飛航模式?! [Subtitle]: 開啟後它會完全關閉無線充電功能. (5) [Variety]: 節省電力. [Variety]: 延長續航. (6) [Slogan]: ADAM elements 全球首款 VIONTA 系列的超薄型磁吸行動電源. [Logo]: L5. [Logo]: L10. (7) [Variety]: 獨家飛航模式. [Slogan]: 操作超簡單!!! (8) [Subtitle]: 只要把行動電源開機之後. (9) [Variety]: 燈號閃爍三次. (10) [Variety]: 飛航模式. [Subtitle]: 那你的無線充電就關閉了. (11) [Variety]: 無線充電功能關閉. (12) [Variety]: 為何行動電源也要飛航模式. [Slogan]: #規定1: 要標示「瓦時 Wh」數值. (13) [Slogan]: 行動電源容量<160Wh (約 32,000mAh). (14) [Slogan]: 行動電源容量<100Wh (約 27,000mAh). (15) [Slogan]: #規定2: 就是你在飛行的途中不能使用行動電源充電. (16) [Variety]: 飛航模式就很重要. (17) [Logo]: L5行動電源. [Slogan]: 5,000mAh/8.9mm 薄/112克. (18) [Variety]: 不佔空間. (19) [Slogan]: 跟 iPhone 16 Pro Max 差不多薄. (20) [Variety]: 抗刮又耐磨. (21) [Logo]: L10行動電源. [Slogan]: 10,000mAh/14.4mm 薄/178克. (22) [Variety]: 超貼心的. (23) [Slogan]: 方便又質感. (24) [Slogan]: 一模一樣的配色. (25) [Variety]: 有沒有看到MagSafe的動畫. (26) [Variety]: 即時追蹤. (27) [Variety]: 強迫症超級愛!. (28) [Slogan]: 20W 快充. (29) [Slogan]: 12個月有限保固. (30) [Slogan]: ADAM elements 的行動電源吧.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator speaking, at least 3 blurred passers-by in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man with a grey flat cap, glasses, a black wedding ring, and a white t-shirt with stylized cat graphics.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A brightly lit indoor public space with tables, chairs, and blurred people. A plane is visible through a window in some cuts.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male narrator begins speaking in a clear, energetic, and professional tone in Traditional Chinese. An upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music track with a steady synth beat starts simultaneously. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect punctuates a transition as the narrator's pitch slightly increases to emphasize urgency about airline regulations. (3) A soft 'pop' sound effect is heard when a graphic appears on screen. The narrator continues at a high speech rate with precise articulation. (4) A distinctive 'ding' sound effect triggers as a power bank is placed on the table, followed by the sound of a mechanical click when a button is pressed. (5) A digital interface 'ping' sound accompanies the appearance of a charging animation. The BGM remains constant in the background, providing a rhythmic foundation. (6) The narrator's tone becomes more persuasive and friendly while describing product features, with occasional 'whoosh' sounds marking visual scene transitions. (7) The video concludes with the narrator's closing call to action, the BGM fading out slightly after the final sentence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Regulation Context -> Solution/Product Intro -> Feature Deep Dive -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform travelers about new airline power bank regulations and promote the ADAM elements VIONTA series power banks as a compliant and feature-rich solution, specifically highlighting its unique 'Airplane Mode' that disables wireless charging to save power and meet safety standards.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator extensively demonstrates the product, names the brand 'ADAM elements', and lists specific model features and purchase benefits like extended warranty.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses the 'hook' of changing airline regulations to introduce a niche product feature (Airplane Mode for power banks). The high production value with crisp SFX and fast-paced editing is typical of tech influencers in the region.
